name: Lifestyle · 4-occasion grid

do: 2×2 grid of four lifestyle vignettes, each with a single circular icon and an uppercase label
each vignette frames the product in a specific real-world occasion
consistent color grading across all four panels (treated as one shoot)
dont: no faces in close-up (use hands, partial silhouettes, environment)
no copy on the vignettes themselves — only the four labels

body: Amazon listing lifestyle grid for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square. 2×2 grid of four lifestyle vignettes showing the product in distinct use-case moments. Each vignette has a {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} circular icon top-left and a short uppercase label in {{BRAND_FONT_PRIMARY}} (≤ 3 words each). Suggested four occasions for a {{PRODUCT_CATEGORY}}: post-workout fuel, mid-day boost, on-the-go quick win, late-night craving — pick four that best match {{PRODUCT_OCCASION}}. Consistent color grading across all four panels so it reads as one shoot, not four AI generations. Hands and environment present — no full faces.

angles.name: 2×2 occasion grid (default)
angles.description: Four equal panels, each one moment.

angles.name: Hero + three thumbnails
angles.description: One large hero vignette plus three smaller thumbnails.
angles.prompt_modifier: Layout shifts: one large hero vignette occupying the left 60%, three smaller thumbnails stacked on the right 40%. Hero shows the highest-value occasion; thumbnails show secondary moments.
